title: quercus aegilops subsp. pyrami
intro: Quercus aegilops subsp. pyrami, also known as the Pyramidal Oak, is a subspecies of the Quercus aegilops tree, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Quercus aegilops subsp. pyrami include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and salves for topical application.
